<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type t
  type content_type = (string * string) * (string * string) list
  type file_info =
    Multipart.file_info = {
    tmp_filename : string;
    filesize : int64;
    raw_original_filename : string;
    file_content_type : Request.content_type option;
  }
  type post_data = (string * string) list * (string * Request.file_info) list
  type client_conn =
      [ `Forwarded_for of string
      | `Inet of Ipaddr.t * int
      | `Unix of string
      | `Unknown ]
  val make :
    ?forward_ip:string list ->
    ?sub_path:string ->
    ?original_full_path:string ->
    ?request_cache:Polytables.t ->
    ?cookies_override:string Ocsigen_cookie_map.Map_inner.t ->
    address:Config.Socket_type.t ->
    port:int ->
    ssl:bool ->
    filenames:string list Stdlib.ref ->
    client_conn:Request.client_conn ->
    body:Cohttp_lwt.Body.t ->
    connection_closed:unit Lwt.t -> Cohttp.Request.t -> Request.t
  val update :
    ?ssl:bool ->
    ?forward_ip:string list ->
    ?client_conn:Request.client_conn ->
    ?sub_path:string ->
    ?meth:Cohttp.Code.meth ->
    ?get_params_flat:(string * string) list ->
    ?post_data:Request.post_data option ->
    ?cookies_override:string Ocsigen_cookie_map.Map_inner.t ->
    ?full_rewrite:bool -> ?uri:Uri.t -> Request.t -> Request.t
  val to_cohttp : Request.t -> Cohttp.Request.t
  val uri : Request.t -> Uri.t
  val body : Request.t -> Cohttp_lwt.Body.t
  val address : Request.t -> Config.Socket_type.t
  val host : Request.t -> string option
  val meth : Request.t -> Cohttp.Code.meth
  val port : Request.t -> int
  val ssl : Request.t -> bool
  val version : Request.t -> Cohttp.Code.version
  val query : Request.t -> string option
  val get_params : Request.t -> (string * string list) list
  val get_params_flat : Request.t -> (string * string) list
  val path : Request.t -> string list
  val path_string : Request.t -> string
  val sub_path : Request.t -> string list
  val sub_path_string : Request.t -> string
  val original_full_path : Request.t -> string list
  val original_full_path_string : Request.t -> string
  val header : Request.t -> Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t -> string option
  val header_multi : Request.t -> Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t -> string list
  val add_header :
    Request.t -> Ocsigen_http.Header.Name.t -> string -> Request.t
  val cookies : Request.t -> string Ocsigen_cookie_map.Map_inner.t
  val files :
    Request.t ->
    string option ->
    Stdlib.Int64.t option -> (string * Request.file_info) list Lwt.t option
  val post_params :
    Request.t ->
    string option ->
    Stdlib.Int64.t option -> (string * string) list Lwt.t option
  val client_conn : Request.t -> Request.client_conn
  val client_conn_to_string : Request.t -> string
  val forward_ip : Request.t -> string list
  val content_type : Request.t -> Request.content_type option
  val request_cache : Request.t -> Polytables.t
  val tries : Request.t -> int
  val incr_tries : Request.t -> unit
  val connection_closed : Request.t -> unit Lwt.t
  val timeofday : Request.t -> float
end >>
